question: Where is the soccer ball located in the image? Select from the following options: (A) In the air between the players. (B) On the ground. (C) On the side of the image. (D) Cannot be determined from the given information.
gold_answer: In the air between the players
answer_choices: In the air between the players
On the side of the image
Cannot be determined from the given information
inpaint_prompt: Fill the masked region naturally, removing whatever objects appear there. Preserve the rest of the image exactly.
inpaint_negative_prompt: text, watermark, logo, artifacts, distortion, blur
